locale.label: UI language
locale.hint: Controls menus, labels, and messages. Auto follows browser language. Timezone-based suggestions appear separately with your consent (not IP/VPN).

localeSuggestion.message: Your timezone is {{timeZone}}. Switch the interface to {{language}}?

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred in this view.
